methodology.notes: Off-the-shelf GLM-5.2 served on Fireworks AI via the standard tau2-bench scaffold (default prompts and tools). Agent and user simulator are both GLM-5.2 (not the recommended gpt-5.2). Run at GLM-5.2's default reasoning tier (Max), 4 trials per task. On banking_knowledge (alltools retrieval: BM25 + OpenAI dense + agentic shell), ~19% of simulations hit the 200-step cap because the model repeatedly issued identical shell/grep commands in a loop; these score 0 and are reflected in the reported numbers and the elevated banking cost. Per-domain cost is average agent cost per trajectory, computed from token usage and Fireworks serverless GLM-5.2 rates ($1.40 input / $0.26 cached input / $4.40 output per 1M tokens), accounting for prompt-cache hits; LiteLLM has no built-in pricing for this model.
